Place your custom hunt images in this folder using these exact filenames:

1) specialties-bighorn.jpg
   - Used in "Desert Bighorn Sheep" card

2) specialties-mule-deer.jpg
   - Used in "Mule Deer" card

3) specialties-coues-deer.jpg
   - Used in "Coues Deer" card

4) scrolly-mule-deer.jpg
   - Used in the "The Wild Essence / Precision in Every Moment" scroll section
